Tokyo: This city is the capital of Japan and one of the largest metropolitan areas in the world.
Shanghai: This city is a major Chinese port on the Yangtze estuary and is famous for its skyline.
Beijing: This city is the capital of China and is associated with the Forbidden City and nearby Great Wall sections.
Delhi: This city is the capital territory of India and sits on the Yamuna River.
Mumbai: This city is India's financial center and is closely associated with Bollywood.
Bangkok: This city is the capital of Thailand and is known for canals, temples, and busy street life.
Singapore: This island city-state is a major global finance and shipping hub in Southeast Asia.
Seoul: This city is the capital of South Korea and lies on the Han River.
Jakarta: This city is the capital of Indonesia and lies on the northwest coast of Java.
London: This city is the capital of the United Kingdom and stands on the River Thames.
Paris: This city is the capital of France and is famous for the Eiffel Tower and the Seine.
Berlin: This city is the capital of Germany and is known for its modern history and cultural scene.
Madrid: This city is the capital of Spain and lies near the center of the Iberian Peninsula.
Rome: This city is the capital of Italy and is associated with the Colosseum and the Vatican.
Moscow: This city is the capital of Russia and stands on the Moskva River.
Barcelona: This city is a major Mediterranean city in Catalonia known for Gaudí architecture.
Amsterdam: This city is the capital of the Netherlands and is famous for its canals and bicycles.
Vienna: This city is the capital of Austria and is known for imperial history and classical music.
Cairo: This city is the capital of Egypt and lies near the Nile and the pyramids of Giza.
Lagos: This city is Nigeria's largest city and a major coastal center in West Africa.
Johannesburg: This inland city is South Africa's largest urban center and grew with the gold rush.
Nairobi: This city is the capital of Kenya and is known for the national park on its edge.
Addis Ababa: This city is the capital of Ethiopia and hosts the African Union.
Cape Town: This coastal city is known for Table Mountain and sits near the Cape of Good Hope.
Dakar: This city is the capital of Senegal and sits on the Cap-Vert peninsula.
Kinshasa: This city is the capital of the Democratic Republic of the Congo on the Congo River.
New York: This city is the largest in the United States and includes Manhattan, Brooklyn, and other boroughs.
Los Angeles: This city in California is closely linked with Hollywood and the film industry.
Toronto: This city is Canada's largest city and sits on Lake Ontario.
Mexico City: This city is the capital of Mexico and stands on a high plateau.
Chicago: This city sits on Lake Michigan and is known for architecture and deep-dish pizza.
Houston: This Texas city is linked with the space program and major energy industries.
Montreal: This city in Quebec is a major French-speaking center in North America.
Washington: This city is the capital of the United States and sits on the Potomac River.
Miami: This Florida city is known for beaches, Latin American influence, and Art Deco architecture.
Sao Paulo: This city is the largest in Brazil and a major financial center in South America.
Rio de Janeiro: This coastal city is famous for Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf Mountain, and Carnival.
Buenos Aires: This city is the capital of Argentina and lies on the Río de la Plata.
Ankara: This city is the capital of Turkey and lies in the country's interior.
Bogota: This high-altitude city is the capital of Colombia.
Santiago: This city is the capital of Chile and lies in a valley below the Andes.
Caracas: This city is the capital of Venezuela and sits in a mountain valley near the Caribbean coast.
Sydney: This city is famous for its harbour, Opera House, and Harbour Bridge.
Melbourne: This city is known for laneways, coffee culture, and major sporting events.
Auckland: This city is New Zealand's largest city and is built around harbours and volcanic cones.
Brisbane: This city is the capital of Queensland and sits on a river of the same name.
Perth: This isolated major city sits on Australia's west coast by the Swan River.
Adelaide: This city is the capital of South Australia and is known for festivals and wine regions nearby.
Wellington: This windy harbour city is the capital of New Zealand.
Christchurch: This city on New Zealand's South Island is known for gardens and English heritage.
